resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def isFascinating(self, n: int) -> bool:
        s = str(n) + str(2 * n) + str(3 * n)
        if len(s) != 9 or '0' in s:
            return False
        return len(set(s)) == 9
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Concatenate n, 2n, 3n into a 9-character string; reject if any zero or length ≠ 9. A set of the string must have exactly 9 unique digits (1-9).
